1) **Restart/build status:** ✅ Manual restart for **“Telegram /restart”** is complete — the gateway booted successfully and **Telegram polling is resumed**. No build was needed this time because **no files were changed**.

2) **What changed (high-level):** This restart was a **runtime/session refresh only** (no code or config edits during the restart itself).

3) **What should I verify next?** I can now check either (a) incoming Telegram image delivery/attachment handling, or (b) current Prometheus terminal logs — your pick.
